r352bestbuy__scope3_____2025__59__157324.original_snippet_en: Page 59 reports latest FY25 Total Scope 3 other indirect emissions at 15732438 MTCO2e across listed categories; stored here as 15.732438 MtCO2e.
r352bestbuy__scope3_____2025__59__157324.original_snippet_zh: 第 59 页披露最新 FY25 Total Scope 3 其他间接排放量为 15732438 MTCO2e（覆盖表中列示类别）；本表按 15.732438 MtCO2e 存储。
